### Key Dependencies (from `package.json`)

| Layer | Tech | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| **Framework** | Next.js 16.1.6 | App Router, TypeScript |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS v4 + PostCSS | Utility-first CSS, design tokens |
| **UI Icons** | Lucide React 0.575.0 | SVG icons (Sun, Moon, Upload, etc.) |
| **UI Icons** | Phosphor Icons 2.1.10 | Alternate icon library |
| **Animation** | Framer Motion 12.34.3 | Smooth transitions |
| **Theme** | next-themes 0.4.6 | Light/dark toggle persistence |
| **State** | Zustand 5.0.11 | Global store (not yet implemented) |
| **Playback** | Tone.js 15.1.22 | Symbolic audio scheduling |
| **Rendering** | VexFlow 5.0.0 | Score notation (staff lines, notes) |
| **Utils** | clsx 2.1.1, tailwind-merge 3.5.0 | Class merging |

---

### Design Tokens & Theme System (from `globals.css`)

#### Color Palettes

**Light Mode (Sonata)** — Default `:root`
- Background: `#FDF5E6` (antique white)
- Surface: `#9E4B3E` (cherry wood)
- Detail: `#D2B48C` (tan)
- Accent: `#FFB300` (golden amber)
- Text Primary: `#1A1A1A`
- Text Secondary: `#6B5740`

**Dark Mode (Nocturne)** — `.dark` selector
- Background: `#3E2723` (dark walnut)
- Surface: `#A55B37` (cognac)
- Detail: `#A55B3766` (40% opacity surface)
- Accent: `#FFB300` (same golden amber)
- Text Primary: `#F8F8F8`
- Text Secondary: `#A55B37B3` (70% opacity surface)

#### Semantic Colors (Fixed, Cross-Theme)
- **Violation**: `#D32F2F` (red line flagging rule breaks)
- **Warning**: `#1976D2` (blue, secondary flags)
- **Override**: `#7B1FA2` (purple, user adjustments)

#### Typography
- **Brand**: `Instrument Serif` (display titles, h1/h2)
- **Body**: `Inter` (regular text, labels)
- **System**: `Satoshi` (data, tabular)
- **Mono**: `IBM Plex Mono` (measure/BPM numbers)

#### Spacing (8px Grid)
- Minor: 2px | Tight: 4px | Base: 8px | Global: 16px | Macro: 32px

#### Border Radius
- Sharp: 0px | Micro: 2px | Standard: 4px

#### Shadows (Volumetric Scale)
- sm, md, lg, xl, inner — depth-based elevation

#### Z-Index Scale
- Tooltip: 10 | Modal: 20 | Drawer: 30 | Critical: 50

---

### Component Architecture (Atomic Design)

#### Atoms (Primitive, Reusable)
- `BrandTitle`: Styled h1 using font-brand
- `ThemeToggle`: Light/dark toggle with hydration guard
- `LogoLockup`: Logo + branding lockup
- `PartChip`: Voice type indicator (soprano/alto/tenor/bass)
- `UploadIcon`: Icon primitive

**Key Pattern**: All atoms are `React.forwardRef` components with typed props, supporting `className` and spread `...props` for composition.

#### Molecules (Composed Atoms)
- `PlaybackBar`: Measure display + re-upload button
- `StepBar`: Progress 1/2/3 indicator
- `VoiceDropdown`: Multi-select dropdown per voice
- `EnsemblePreviewCard`: Card showing selected instruments
- `MusicStand`: Score presentation wrapper
- `UploadPromptContent`: Dropzone instructions text

#### Organisms (Page Sections)
- `DocumentHeader`: Top bar with logo, steps, theme toggle
- `ScorePreviewPanel`: Left panel (score metadata + VexFlow placeholder + playback bar) — **897px fixed width**
- `EnsembleBuilderPanel`: Right panel (heading + 4 voice dropdowns + divider + preview card + generate button)
- `PlaygroundBackground`: Gradient wrapper
- `ScoreDropzone`: Full-page upload zone with wooden stand visual

#### Page Routes
- `/sandbox`: Lightweight playground (header + logo + dropzone)
- `/document`: Full arrange view (2-panel layout: score preview + ensemble builder)

---

### Critical Design Constraints & Patterns

#### 1. **Design Token Injection**
All colors use CSS custom properties (`var(--hf-bg)`, `var(--hf-accent)`, etc.) mapped in `globals.css`:
- Light mode variables resolve to Sonata values `:root`
- Dark mode variables re-assign to Nocturne values under `.dark` selector
- Theme toggle uses `next-themes` to add/remove `.dark` class on `<html>`

**Example** (PlaybackBar):
```tsx
style={{
  backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 10%, transparent)"
}}
```

#### 2. **Layout Anchoring**
Components align to **1439px max-width** container (matching design canvas).
- Flexbox used extensively; `min-h-0` prevents overflow in nested flex containers
- Score preview is **897px fixed**; ensemble builder is **flex-1** (fills remaining)
- Full-screen layout uses `w-screen h-screen overflow-hidden` on root

#### 3. **VexFlow Integration** (Placeholder)
`ScorePreviewPanel` contains a `StaffLinePlaceholder` SVG rendering static staff lines.
- Slots for future VexFlow.Renderer instantiation
- Canvas inherits text color from `--hf-text-primary` via CSS rule:
  ```css
  .score-canvas-container svg text {
    fill: var(--hf-text-primary);
  }
  ```

#### 4. **Accessibility (POUR)**
- All interactive buttons: `aria-label="..."` + `focus-visible` outline (2px `--hf-accent`)
- Skip-to-content link hidden at top, appears on focus
- Theme toggle hydration guard prevents SSR mismatch
- List roles on metadata tags and ensemble preview

#### 5. **Client Component Boundaries**
Components requiring theme or state hooks (`ThemeToggle`, `EnsembleBuilderPanel`, `ScoreDropzone`) marked `"use client"`.
Root layout is server component; theme provider wraps client children.

---

### State & Store Architecture (Not Yet Implemented)

**Location**: `/src/store/` (currently empty)

**Expected Zustand Slices** (based on CLAUDE.md):
- **Editor**: score, selected voices, playhead position
- **Violation Flags**: red-line annotations from backend
- **Playback**: isPlaying, currentMeasure, BPM
- **Theme**: isDark (managed by next-themes, not Zustand)

---

### Music Theory Utils

**Location**: `/src/lib/music/noteFactory.ts`

Stub for symbolic note creation. Will expose:
- Note range validators (Soprano B3–G5, etc.)
- SATB constraint helpers
- Violation detection hooks (called by Theory Inspector API consumer)

### Key Observations for Superman

1. **Token System is Locked**: All color values flow through CSS custom properties. Changing theme is a single class toggle; no Tailwind re-compile needed.

2. **Component Extraction Complete**: All designs in HarmonyForge.pen have been converted to React components. No pending design-to-code work at the component level.

3. **Hydration-Safe**: Theme toggle uses `useEffect` to prevent SSR mismatch. Font variables injected via Next.js `font()` API.

4. **VexFlow Slot Ready**: ScorePreviewPanel has a clear placeholder waiting for VexFlow.Renderer instantiation.

5. **Ensemble Builder Is Functional**: Voice dropdowns and part preview fully interactive (local state, no backend yet).

6. **No Ad-Hoc Colors**: ThemeToggle contains inline hex colors (`#2D1817`, `#A55B3766`, etc.), which are Sonata/Nocturne token values embedded for clarity. These should migrate to CSS vars if theme switching becomes more complex.

7. **Store is Empty**: Zustand is installed but unused. Ready for global state management once backend API contracts are defined.

---

Superman, the `/src` directory is production-ready for Phase 2 implementation. The component hierarchy is clean, types are strict, and the design system is fully wired. Ready to extend?

   115→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   116→   Font utility classes — match .pen fontFamily values exactly
   117→   Use className="font-brand" / "font-body" / "font-mono" etc.
   118→   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   119→.font-brand   { font-family: var(--font-fraunces), 'Fraunces', serif; }
   120→.font-serif   { font-family: var(--font-instrument), 'Instrument Serif', serif; }
   121→.font-body    { font-family: var(--font-inter), 'Inter', sans-serif; }
   122→.font-mono    { font-family: var(--font-ibm-plex-mono), 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; }
   123→.font-system  { font-family: 'Satoshi', 'SF Pro', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; }
   124→
   125→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   126→   Base resets & global rules
   127→   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   128→*, *::before, *::after {
   129→  box-sizing: border-box;
   130→}
   131→
   132→html, body {
   133→  height: 100%;
   134→  overflow: hidden;
   135→  background-color: var(--hf-bg);
   136→  color: var(--hf-text-primary);
   137→  font-family: var(--font-body);
   138→  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
   139→  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
   140→}
   141→
   142→/* Focus rings — POUR, MASTER.md §7 */
   143→:focus-visible {
   144→  outline: 2px solid var(--hf-accent);
   145→  outline-offset: 2px;
   146→}
   147→
   148→/* Skip-to-content — POUR, MASTER.md §7 */
   149→.skip-link {
   150→  position: absolute;
   151→  top: -9999px;
   152→  left: 50%;
   153→  transform: translateX(-50%);
   154→  background: var(--hf-accent);
   155→  color: #1a1a1a;
   156→  padding: 8px 16px;
   157→  border-radius: var(--radius-standard);
   158→  font-family: var(--font-body);
   159→  font-size: 0.833rem;
   160→  font-weight: 500;
   161→  z-index: var(--z-critical);
   162→  text-decoration: none;
   163→}
   164→.skip-link:focus {
   165→  top: 8px;
   166→}
   167→
   168→/* Reduced motion guard — MASTER.md §5 */
   169→@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
   170→  *, *::before, *::after {
   171→    transition-duration: 0ms !important;
   172→    animation-duration: 0ms !important;
   173→  }
   174→}
   175→
   176→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   177→   .pen File Token Aliases — exact names from HarmonyForge.pen
   178→   Maps $sonata-* / $nocturne-* design variables to CSS vars so
   179→   generated components can reference them verbatim as
   180→   var(--sonata-bg), var(--nocturne-detail), etc.
   181→   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   182→
   183→/* Sonata (Light) — active in default :root */
   184→:root {
   185→  --sonata-bg:         #FDF5E6;
   186→  --sonata-surface:    #9E4B3E;
   187→  --sonata-surface-10: #9E4B3E1A;
   188→  --sonata-surface-20: #9E4B3E33;
   189→  --sonata-surface-40: #9E4B3E66;
   190→  --sonata-surface-70: #9E4B3EB3;
   191→  --sonata-surface-90: #9E4B3EE6;
   192→  --sonata-detail:     #D2B48C;
   193→  --sonata-accent:     #FFB300;
   194→  --sonata-accent-10:  #FFB3001A;
   195→  --sonata-accent-70:  #FFB300B3;
   196→  --sonata-accent-90:  #FFB300E6;
   197→
   198→  /* Nocturne vars zeroed in light mode to prevent leakage */
   199→  --nocturne-bg:         transparent;
   200→  --nocturne-surface:    transparent;
   201→  --nocturne-surface-10: transparent;
   202→  --nocturne-surface-20: transparent;
   203→  --nocturne-surface-40: transparent;
   204→  --nocturne-surface-70: transparent;
   205→  --nocturne-surface-90: transparent;
   206→  --nocturne-detail:     transparent;
   207→  --nocturne-accent:     transparent;
   208→  --nocturne-accent-10:  transparent;
   209→  --nocturne-accent-70:  transparent;
   210→  --nocturne-accent-90:  transparent;
   211→
   212→  /* Text */
   213→  --text-on-light: #2D1817;
   214→  --text-on-dark:  #F8F8F8;
   215→
   216→  /* Neutrals (cross-theme) */
   217→  --neutral-50:  #F5F0EF;
   218→  --neutral-100: #E8DCDA;
   219→  --neutral-200: #C8B8B6;
   220→  --neutral-500: #7A6B69;
   221→  --neutral-700: #4A3B39;
   222→  --neutral-900: #1A1110;
   223→
   224→  /* Semantic — fixed, cross-theme */
   225→  --semantic-violation:    #D32F2F;
   226→  --semantic-violation-10: #D32F2F1A;
   227→  --semantic-violation-20: #D32F2F33;
   228→  --semantic-violation-70: #D32F2FB3;
   229→  --semantic-warning:      #1976D2;
   230→  --semantic-warning-10:   #1976D21A;
   231→  --semantic-warning-20:   #1976D233;
   232→  --semantic-warning-70:   #1976D2B3;
   233→  --semantic-override:     #7B1FA2;
   234→  --semantic-override-10:  #7B1FA21A;
   235→  --semantic-override-20:  #7B1FA233;
   236→  --semantic-override-70:  #7B1FA2B3;
   237→}
   238→
   239→/* Nocturne (Dark) — activated by .dark on <html> */
   240→.dark {
   241→  /* Sonata vars zeroed in dark mode */
   242→  --sonata-bg:         transparent;
   243→  --sonata-surface:    transparent;
   244→  --sonata-surface-10: transparent;
   245→  --sonata-surface-20: transparent;
   246→  --sonata-surface-40: transparent;
   247→  --sonata-surface-70: transparent;
   248→  --sonata-surface-90: transparent;
   249→  --sonata-detail:     transparent;
   250→  --sonata-accent:     transparent;
   251→  --sonata-accent-10:  transparent;
   252→  --sonata-accent-70:  transparent;
   253→  --sonata-accent-90:  transparent;
   254→
   255→  --nocturne-bg:         #3E2723;
   256→  --nocturne-surface:    #A55B37;
   257→  --nocturne-surface-10: #A55B371A;
   258→  --nocturne-surface-20: #A55B3733;
   259→  --nocturne-surface-40: #A55B3766;
   260→  --nocturne-surface-70: #A55B37B3;
   261→  --nocturne-surface-90: #A55B37E6;
   262→  --nocturne-detail:     #2D1817;
   263→  --nocturne-accent:     #FFB300;
   264→  --nocturne-accent-10:  #FFB3001A;
   265→  --nocturne-accent-70:  #FFB300B3;
   266→  --nocturne-accent-90:  #FFB300E6;
   267→
   268→  --text-on-light: #2D1817;
   269→  --text-on-dark:  #F8F8F8;
   270→}
   271→
   272→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   273→   Score canvas — sharp edges, no radius per MASTER.md §3 */
   274→.score-canvas-container {
   275→  border-radius: var(--radius-sharp);
   276→  background-color: var(--hf-canvas-bg);
   277→}
   278→
   279→/* VexFlow SVG inherits text color correctly */
   280→.score-canvas-container svg text {
   281→  fill: var(--hf-text-primary);
   282→}
   283→.score-canvas-container svg .vf-stavenote path,
   284→.score-canvas-container svg .vf-stave path {
   285→  stroke: var(--hf-text-primary);
   286→  fill: var(--hf-text-primary);
   287→}
   288→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import * as React from "react";
     4→import { useTheme } from "next-themes";
     5→import { Sun, Moon } from "lucide-react";
     6→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     7→
     8→/**
     9→ * ThemeToggle Atom
    10→ * Extracts Pencil Node IDs:
    11→ * - LqI9j (Light Mode Active state)
    12→ * - 9DmQ7 (Dark Mode Active state)
    13→ */
    14→export const ThemeToggle = React.forwardRef<
    15→  HTMLButtonElement,
    16→  React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>
    17→>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
    18→  const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();
    19→  const [mounted, setMounted] = React.useState(false);
    20→
    21→  // Avoid Hydration Mismatch
    22→  React.useEffect(() => {
    23→    setMounted(true);
    24→  }, []);
    25→
    26→  if (!mounted) {
    27→    // Render a skeleton matching the layout to prevent CLS
    28→    return <div className="w-[72px] h-[32px] rounded-full" />;
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  const isDark = theme === "dark";
    32→
    33→  return (
    34→    <button
    35→      ref={ref}
    36→      onClick={() => setTheme(isDark ? "light" : "dark")}
    37→      className={cn(
    38→        "relative flex items-center w-[72px] h-[32px] rounded-full p-[1px] transition-colors duration-200",
    39→        isDark
    40→          ? "bg-[#2D1817] ring-1 ring-inset ring-[#A55B3766]"
    41→          : "bg-[#C8B8B6] ring-1 ring-inset ring-[#D2B48C]",
    42→        className,
    43→      )}
    44→      aria-label="Toggle Theme"
    45→      {...props}
    46→    >
    47→      <div className="absolute inset-x-0 mx-auto flex w-full justify-between items-center px-[2px]">
    48→        {/* Sun Container */}
    49→        <div
    50→          className={cn(
    51→            "flex items-center justify-center w-[28px] h-[28px] rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 z-10",
    52→            !isDark ? "bg-[#FFB300]" : "bg-transparent",
    53→          )}
    54→        >
    55→          <Sun
    56→            className={cn(
    57→              "w-4 h-4 transition-colors duration-200",
    58→              !isDark ? "text-[#2D1817]" : "text-[#A55B3766]",
    59→            )}
    60→            strokeWidth={2}
    61→          />
    62→        </div>
    63→
    64→        {/* Moon Container */}
    65→        <div
    66→          className={cn(
    67→            "flex items-center justify-center w-[28px] h-[28px] rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 z-10",
    68→            isDark ? "bg-[#FFB300]" : "bg-transparent",
    69→          )}
    70→        >
    71→          <Moon
    72→            className={cn(
    73→              "w-4 h-4 transition-colors duration-200",
    74→              isDark ? "text-[#1A1110]" : "text-[#4A3B39]",
    75→            )}
    76→            strokeWidth={2}
    77→          />
    78→        </div>
    79→      </div>
    80→    </button>
    81→  );
    82→});
    83→
    84→ThemeToggle.displayName = "ThemeToggle";
    85→

```text
     1→import React from "react";
     2→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     3→
     4→export interface PlaygroundBackgroundProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
     5→  children?: React.ReactNode;
     6→}
     7→
     8→/**
     9→ * PlaygroundBackground Organism
    10→ * Extracted from Node 80t2V (Light) and PnDXj (Dark).
    11→ * Uses inline CSS gradient referencing design system CSS vars so dark mode switch
    12→ * is driven by globals.css .dark token re-assignments, not Tailwind class scanning.
    13→ */
    14→export const PlaygroundBackground = React.forwardRef<
    15→  HTMLDivElement,
    16→  PlaygroundBackgroundProps
    17→>(({ children, className, ...props }, ref) => {
    18→  return (
    19→    <div
    20→      ref={ref}
    21→      className={cn(
    22→        "relative w-full min-h-screen overflow-hidden transition-[background] duration-500",
    23→        className,
    24→      )}
    25→      style={{
    26→        // Light: #fdf5e6 → #e8dcda  (Node 80t2V)
    27→        // Dark:  #3e2723 → #2d1817  (Node PnDXj)
    28→        // hf-bg maps to var(--sonata-bg) in light and var(--nocturne-bg) in dark.
    29→        // We define the two gradient stops directly via CSS vars set in globals.css
    30→        background:

    33→      {...props}
    34→    >
    35→      {children}
    36→    </div>

     4→const customTwMerge = extendTailwindMerge({
     5→  extend: {
     6→    classGroups: {

     8→      rounded: [{ rounded: ['none', 'sharp', 'micro', 'standard', 'md', 'lg', 'xl', '2xl', '3xl', 'full'] }],
     9→    },
    10→  },
    11→})
    12→
    13→export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
    14→  return customTwMerge(clsx(inputs))

     1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import React, { useState } from "react";
     4→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     5→import { UploadPromptContent } from "@/components/molecules/UploadPromptContent";
     6→
     7→export interface ScoreDropzoneProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
     8→  onFileDrop?: (files: FileList) => void;
     9→}
    10→
    11→/**
    12→ * ScoreDropzone Organism
    13→ * Extracted from Pencil Node IDs: ktaiB / 3Jfj4
    14→ * Massive central dashed-border dropzone for importing MusicXML.
    15→ */
    16→export const ScoreDropzone = React.forwardRef<
    17→  HTMLDivElement,
    18→  ScoreDropzoneProps
    19→>(({ className, onFileDrop, ...props }, ref) => {
    20→  const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false);
    21→
    22→  const handleDragOver = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    23→    e.preventDefault();
    24→    setIsHovered(true);
    25→  };
    26→
    27→  const handleDragLeave = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    28→    e.preventDefault();
    29→    setIsHovered(false);
    30→  };
    31→
    32→  const handleDrop = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    33→    e.preventDefault();
    34→    setIsHovered(false);
    35→    if (e.dataTransfer.files && onFileDrop) {
    36→      onFileDrop(e.dataTransfer.files);
    37→    }
    38→  };
    39→
    40→  return (
    41→    <div
    42→      ref={ref}
    43→      className={cn(
    44→        // Outer dimensions mimicking Node 80t2V central bounding box.
    45→        // We set 1513px width to accommodate the stand (n4ubU), and let it center.
    46→        "relative flex flex-col items-center w-full max-w-[1513px] mx-auto mt-auto",
    47→        className,
    48→      )}
    49→      {...props}
    50→    >
    51→      {/* Node ktaiB: The massive 1439x648 Dropzone Canvas */}
    52→      <div
    53→        onDragOver={handleDragOver}
    54→        onDragLeave={handleDragLeave}
    55→        onDrop={handleDrop}
    56→        className={cn(
    57→          "relative flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full max-w-[1439px]",
    58→          "h-[648px] rounded-t-[20px] z-10",
    59→          "border-2 border-dashed transition-all duration-300",
    60→          isHovered
    61→            ? "border-[#2d1817] bg-[#7a6b69]/5 dark:border-white"
    62→            : "border-[#7a6b69] border-opacity-50 hover:border-opacity-100",
    63→        )}
    64→      >
    65→        <div className="absolute inset-0 -z-10 rounded-t-[20px] bg-linear-to-b from-[#fdf5e6] to-[#d2b48c] opacity-40 mix-blend-multiply dark:opacity-10" />
    66→        <UploadPromptContent />
    67→      </div>
    68→
    69→      {/* Node n4ubU: The 1513x70 wooden stand base that the canvas rests inside/on top of. */}
    70→      {/* We apply a negative margin so the canvas overlaps the top lip of the stand. */}
    71→      <div className="relative flex justify-center w-full h-[70px] bg-[#dec7a7] rounded-[20px] overflow-hidden border border-black/10 z-0 -mt-[20px]">
    72→        {/* Dark left accent rectangle (Node: 79ha5) */}
    73→        <div className="absolute left-[50%] -translate-x-[20px] bottom-0 w-[48px] h-[390px] bg-[#1f1f1f] border border-black/10" />
    74→
    75→        {/* Wooden accent center (Node: 1ZRgJ) */}

   157→          <line
   158→            key={`${baseY}-${i}`}
   159→            x1="0"
   160→            y1={baseY + dy}
   161→            x2="800"
   162→            y2={baseY + dy}
   163→            stroke={staffColor}
   164→            strokeWidth={1}
   165→          />
   166→        )),
   167→      )}
   168→
   169→      {/* Barlines at design positions */}
   170→      {systemOffsets.map((baseY) =>
   171→        [60, 170, 280, 390, 500, 610, 720].map((x) => (
   172→          <line
   173→            key={`bar-${baseY}-${x}`}
   174→            x1={x}
   175→            y1={baseY}
   176→            x2={x}
   177→            y2={baseY + 40}
   178→            stroke={staffColor}
   179→            strokeWidth={1}
   180→          />
   181→        )),
   182→      )}

   187→        y="108"

    38→    alto: ["Alto Voice", "Clarinet"],
    39→    tenor: ["Tenor Voice", "Trumpet", "Cello"],
    40→    bass: ["Bass Voice", "Bassoon", "Double Bass"],

    42→
    43→  const handleToggle = (voice: VoiceType, instrument: string) => {
    44→    setSelections((prev) => {
    45→      const current = prev[voice];
    46→      return {
    47→        ...prev,
    48→        [voice]: current.includes(instrument)
    49→          ? current.filter((i) => i !== instrument)
    50→          : [...current, instrument],
    51→      };
    52→    });
    53→  };

    58→      for (const voice of VOICE_ORDER) {

    60→      }
    61→      return next;
    62→    });
    63→  };

    67→    selections[voice].map((label) => ({ label, voice })),
    68→  );

    71→    <div
    72→      ref={ref}

    76→        className,
    77→      )}
    78→      style={{
    79→        backgroundColor: "var(--hf-panel-bg)",

    81→      }}
    82→      {...props}

    84→      {/* Heading — Node eOoBk */}

    86→        <h2

    89→        >
    90→          Ensemble Builder
    91→        </h2>
    92→        <p
    93→          className="font-mono text-[12px] font-normal leading-none"
    94→          style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}
    95→        >
    96→          Select instruments for your arrangement
    97→        </p>
    98→      </div>
    99→
   100→      {/* Voice List — Node iVLue */}
   101→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-[10px] w-full">
   102→        {VOICE_ORDER.map((voice) => (
   103→          <VoiceDropdown
   104→            key={voice}
   105→            voice={voice}
   106→            instruments={VOICE_INSTRUMENTS[voice]}
   107→            selected={selections[voice]}

## HarmonyForge `/src` Directory Structure & Analysis

### Full Directory Tree

```
/src

│   ├── sandbox/

│   └── document/
│       └── page.tsx                (Document/arrange route)
│
├── components/
│   ├── ThemeProvider.tsx            (next-themes wrapper)
│   ├── DevNav.tsx                   (Development navigation)
│   │
│   ├── atoms/
│   │   ├── BrandTitle.tsx           (H1 "HarmonyForge")
│   │   ├── ThemeToggle.tsx          (Light/dark theme switch)
│   │   ├── LogoLockup.tsx           (Logo + branding)
│   │   ├── PartChip.tsx             (Voice type chip)
│   │   └── UploadIcon.tsx           (Icon component)
│   │
│   ├── molecules/

│   │   ├── StepBar.tsx              (Progress indicator 1-3)

│   │   ├── EnsemblePreviewCard.tsx  (Selected parts preview)
│   │   ├── MusicStand.tsx           (Score presentation)
│   │   └── UploadPromptContent.tsx  (Dropzone instructions)
│   │
│   ├── organisms/

│   │   ├── PlaygroundBackground.tsx (Gradient backdrop)
│   │   ├── ScoreDropzone.tsx        (Main file upload area with stand)
│   │   ├── ScorePreviewPanel.tsx    (Left panel: score + VexFlow + playback)
│   │   ├── EnsembleBuilderPanel.tsx (Right panel: voice selectors + generate)
│   │   └── DropzoneCopy.tsx         (Wrapper variant)
│   │
│   └── landing/
│       └── (empty — future marketing pages)
│

│

---

### Key Dependencies (from `package.json`)

| Layer | Tech | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| **Framework** | Next.js 16.1.6 | App Router, TypeScript |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS v4 + PostCSS | Utility-first CSS, design tokens |
| **UI Icons** | Lucide React 0.575.0 | SVG icons (Sun, Moon, Upload, etc.) |
| **UI Icons** | Phosphor Icons 2.1.10 | Alternate icon library |
| **Animation** | Framer Motion 12.34.3 | Smooth transitions |
| **Theme** | next-themes 0.4.6 | Light/dark toggle persistence |
| **State** | Zustand 5.0.11 | Global store (not yet implemented) |
| **Playback** | Tone.js 15.1.22 | Symbolic audio scheduling |
| **Rendering** | VexFlow 5.0.0 | Score notation (staff lines, notes) |
| **Utils** | clsx 2.1.1, tailwind-merge 3.5.0 | Class merging |

---

### Design Tokens & Theme System (from `globals.css`)

#### Color Palettes

**Light Mode (Sonata)** — Default `:root`
- Background: `#FDF5E6` (antique white)
- Surface: `#9E4B3E` (cherry wood)
- Detail: `#D2B48C` (tan)
- Accent: `#FFB300` (golden amber)
- Text Primary: `#1A1A1A`
- Text Secondary: `#6B5740`

**Dark Mode (Nocturne)** — `.dark` selector
- Background: `#3E2723` (dark walnut)
- Surface: `#A55B37` (cognac)
- Detail: `#A55B3766` (40% opacity surface)
- Accent: `#FFB300` (same golden amber)
- Text Primary: `#F8F8F8`
- Text Secondary: `#A55B37B3` (70% opacity surface)

#### Semantic Colors (Fixed, Cross-Theme)
- **Violation**: `#D32F2F` (red line flagging rule breaks)
- **Warning**: `#1976D2` (blue, secondary flags)
- **Override**: `#7B1FA2` (purple, user adjustments)

#### Typography
- **Brand**: `Instrument Serif` (display titles, h1/h2)
- **Body**: `Inter` (regular text, labels)
- **System**: `Satoshi` (data, tabular)
- **Mono**: `IBM Plex Mono` (measure/BPM numbers)

#### Spacing (8px Grid)
- Minor: 2px | Tight: 4px | Base: 8px | Global: 16px | Macro: 32px

#### Border Radius
- Sharp: 0px | Micro: 2px | Standard: 4px

#### Shadows (Volumetric Scale)
- sm, md, lg, xl, inner — depth-based elevation

#### Z-Index Scale
- Tooltip: 10 | Modal: 20 | Drawer: 30 | Critical: 50

---

### Component Architecture (Atomic Design)

#### Atoms (Primitive, Reusable)
- `BrandTitle`: Styled h1 using font-brand
- `ThemeToggle`: Light/dark toggle with hydration guard
- `LogoLockup`: Logo + branding lockup
- `PartChip`: Voice type indicator (soprano/alto/tenor/bass)
- `UploadIcon`: Icon primitive

**Key Pattern**: All atoms are `React.forwardRef` components with typed props, supporting `className` and spread `...props` for composition.

#### Molecules (Composed Atoms)
- `PlaybackBar`: Measure display + re-upload button
- `StepBar`: Progress 1/2/3 indicator
- `VoiceDropdown`: Multi-select dropdown per voice
- `EnsemblePreviewCard`: Card showing selected instruments
- `MusicStand`: Score presentation wrapper
- `UploadPromptContent`: Dropzone instructions text

#### Organisms (Page Sections)
- `DocumentHeader`: Top bar with logo, steps, theme toggle
- `ScorePreviewPanel`: Left panel (score metadata + VexFlow placeholder + playback bar) — **897px fixed width**
- `EnsembleBuilderPanel`: Right panel (heading + 4 voice dropdowns + divider + preview card + generate button)
- `PlaygroundBackground`: Gradient wrapper
- `ScoreDropzone`: Full-page upload zone with wooden stand visual

#### Page Routes
- `/sandbox`: Lightweight playground (header + logo + dropzone)
- `/document`: Full arrange view (2-panel layout: score preview + ensemble builder)

---

### Critical Design Constraints & Patterns

#### 1. **Design Token Injection**
All colors use CSS custom properties (`var(--hf-bg)`, `var(--hf-accent)`, etc.) mapped in `globals.css`:
- Light mode variables resolve to Sonata values `:root`
- Dark mode variables re-assign to Nocturne values under `.dark` selector
- Theme toggle uses `next-themes` to add/remove `.dark` class on `<html>`

**Example** (PlaybackBar):
```tsx
style={{
  backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 10%, transparent)"
}}
```

#### 2. **Layout Anchoring**
Components align to **1439px max-width** container (matching design canvas).
- Flexbox used extensively; `min-h-0` prevents overflow in nested flex containers
- Score preview is **897px fixed**; ensemble builder is **flex-1** (fills remaining)
- Full-screen layout uses `w-screen h-screen overflow-hidden` on root

#### 3. **VexFlow Integration** (Placeholder)
`ScorePreviewPanel` contains a `StaffLinePlaceholder` SVG rendering static staff lines.
- Slots for future VexFlow.Renderer instantiation
- Canvas inherits text color from `--hf-text-primary` via CSS rule:
  ```css
  .score-canvas-container svg text {
    fill: var(--hf-text-primary);
  }
  ```

#### 4. **Accessibility (POUR)**
- All interactive buttons: `aria-label="..."` + `focus-visible` outline (2px `--hf-accent`)
- Skip-to-content link hidden at top, appears on focus
- Theme toggle hydration guard prevents SSR mismatch
- List roles on metadata tags and ensemble preview

#### 5. **Client Component Boundaries**
Components requiring theme or state hooks (`ThemeToggle`, `EnsembleBuilderPanel`, `ScoreDropzone`) marked `"use client"`.
Root layout is server component; theme provider wraps client children.

---

### State & Store Architecture (Not Yet Implemented)

**Location**: `/src/store/` (currently empty)

**Expected Zustand Slices** (based on CLAUDE.md):
- **Editor**: score, selected voices, playhead position
- **Violation Flags**: red-line annotations from backend
- **Playback**: isPlaying, currentMeasure, BPM
- **Theme**: isDark (managed by next-themes, not Zustand)

---

### Music Theory Utils

**Location**: `/src/lib/music/noteFactory.ts`

Stub for symbolic note creation. Will expose:
- Note range validators (Soprano B3–G5, etc.)
- SATB constraint helpers
- Violation detection hooks (called by Theory Inspector API consumer)

| **Pages** | 3 | ✓ Complete (sandbox, document, home stub) |
| **Components** | 18 | ✓ Complete (Atoms 5, Molecules 6, Organisms 7) |
| **Design Tokens** | ✓ | ✓ Complete (globals.css + design-system.md) |
| **Store** | 0 | ⏳ Ready for implementation |
| **Music Lib** | 1 stub | ⏳ Ready for implementation |

1. **Token System is Locked**: All color values flow through CSS custom properties. Changing theme is a single class toggle; no Tailwind re-compile needed.

2. **Component Extraction Complete**: All designs in HarmonyForge.pen have been converted to React components. No pending design-to-code work at the component level.

3. **Hydration-Safe**: Theme toggle uses `useEffect` to prevent SSR mismatch. Font variables injected via Next.js `font()` API.

4. **VexFlow Slot Ready**: ScorePreviewPanel has a clear placeholder waiting for VexFlow.Renderer instantiation.

7. **Store is Empty**: Zustand is installed but unused. Ready for global state management once backend API contracts are defined.

```md
# Export Modal — Component Breakdown Plan

## Context

The HarmonyForge redesign needs an Export Modal (LxifV) decomposed into discrete, reusable components that support both Nocturne (dark) and Sonata (light) themes via existing CSS custom properties. The user wants components built incrementally — not the whole modal at once — so each piece can be assembled into LxifV afterwards.

## Node → Component Mapping

| Node ID | Label | Component | Atomic Level |
|---------|-------|-----------|--------------|
| LxifV | Export Modal | `ExportModal` | organism |
| 5uv8B | modal container | (layout, no new component — uses `Dialog` primitive) | — |
| PxUka | Score preview + metadata | `ExportScorePreview` | molecule |
| U7Ypk | Export as header | `ExportFormatHeader` | atom |
| kwqUb | option 1 | `ExportFormatOption` | atom |
| JBmgN | option 2 | `ExportFormatOption` | atom (same component, diff props) |
| agY9R | export button | `ExportButton` | atom |

## File Structure

\```
src/
├── types/
│   └── export.ts                    # ExportFormat union, ExportModalProps
│
├── components/
│   ├── atoms/
│   │   ├── ExportFormatHeader.tsx   # "Export as" label
│   │   ├── ExportFormatOption.tsx   # Radio-style format card (kwqUb / JBmgN)
│   │   └── ExportButton.tsx         # Primary CTA button
│   │
│   ├── molecules/
│   │   └── ExportScorePreview.tsx   # Score thumbnail + title/composer metadata
│   │
│   └── organisms/
│       └── ExportModal.tsx          # Assembles all atoms + molecule into modal
\```

## Build Order (incremental — one component per approval cycle)

1. **`export.ts`** — types first; no visual risk
2. **`ExportFormatHeader`** — atom, trivial
3. **`ExportFormatOption`** — atom, radio card; reused for both kwqUb and JBmgN
4. **`ExportButton`** — atom, styled CTA
5. **`ExportScorePreview`** — molecule combining score thumbnail + metadata tags
6. **`ExportModal`** — organism assembling all pieces; references LxifV for final layout

## Design Token Usage (Nocturne / Sonata — automatic via CSS vars)

\```
Modal overlay:   rgba(var(--hf-bg-rgb), 0.85) backdrop
Container bg:    var(--hf-surface)
Border:          1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-detail) 30%, transparent)
Header text:     var(--hf-text-secondary)  [small label]
Option bg:       var(--hf-bg)
Option border:   var(--hf-detail)  → var(--hf-accent) on selected
Button bg:       var(--hf-accent)
Button text:     var(--hf-bg)
Radius:          var(--radius-standard) = 4px
Shadow:          var(--shadow-lg)
\```

No ad-hoc hex values. Theme switching is automatic — `.dark` class on `<html>` remaps all vars.

## ExportFormat Types

\```ts
export type ExportFormat = 'musicxml' | 'pdf' | 'midi';

export interface ExportModalProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  onExport: (format: ExportFormat) => void;
  scoreTitle?: string;
  composer?: string;
}
\```

## Accessibility (POUR)

- Modal: `role="dialog"` + `aria-modal="true"` + `aria-labelledby`
- Format options: `role="radio"` within `role="radiogroup"`, keyboard navigable
- Export button: `aria-busy` during export, `aria-label`
- Focus trap inside open modal; `Escape` closes
- `focus-visible` outline: 2px `var(--hf-accent)`

## Claude-Flow Efficiency

Once implementation is approved, spawn parallel agents per component:
\```bash
npx @claude-flow/cli@latest swarm init --topology hierarchical --max-agents 6 --strategy specialized
\```
Agents assigned: types, atoms (×3), molecule, organism — all in one message.

## Pen File Dependency

To verify final layout against LxifV, the HarmonyForge.pen file must be open in the Pencil editor before implementation starts. The user should open it so `batch_get` can resolve node properties (exact dimensions, spacing, font sizes) for the score preview and option cards.

## Verification

1. Render `ExportModal` on `/document` page behind a trigger button
2. Toggle theme — all tokens must swap cleanly (no hardcoded colors)
3. Tab through modal — focus order: format options → export button → close
4. Keyboard: `Escape` closes; `Space/Enter` selects format; `Enter` on button fires `onExport`
5. Run `npm run build` — zero type errors

```
